title: Trade Execution P49 Risk Drift Drilldown

options.content: Use **sid** and **decision_id** variables to drill into mismatch quarantine events and correlated risk decisions.

targets.rawSql: select created_ts_ms, sid, decision_id, symbol, tier, repeated_count, mismatch_rate, quarantine_action from risk_mismatch_quarantine_ledger where ('${sid}' = '' or sid='${sid}') and ('${decision_id}' = '' or decision_id='${decision_id}') order by created_ts_ms desc limit 200

select created_ts_ms, decision_id, sid, symbol, tier, level, effective_execution_policy, adjusted_notional_usd, leverage_cap, clamp_ratio from risk_decisions where ('${sid}' = '' or sid='${sid}') and ('${decision_id}' = '' or decision_id='${decision_id}') order by created_ts_ms desc limit 200

select updated_ts_ms, decision_id, sid, symbol, tier, level, effective_execution_policy, adjusted_notional_usd, leverage_cap, clamp_ratio from risk_snapshot where ('${sid}' = '' or sid='${sid}') and ('${decision_id}' = '' or decision_id='${decision_id}') order by updated_ts_ms desc limit 200
